FORM.HEADING: Join the Association / Request Information:
FORM.DESCRIPTION: The main purpose of the association is to promote and enhance the value of the industrial and professional fabric within the construction sector, the companies and organizations that work to define a new model of industrialized construction (off-site, prefabricated, sustainable and complying with circular economy criteria), fostering competitiveness and collaboration among member infrastructures within the construction sector.

FOOTER.DIRECTION: Camino del Río s/n, Molí Fariner, 08760 Martorell, Catalonia.

NEWSLETTER.TITLE: Welcome to the Future of Construction
NEWSLETTER.SUBTITLE: Be part of the change. Connect. Transform. Build.
NEWSLETTER.BODY:
The Cluster of Industrialized Construction of Catalonia is not just a network of companies: it is the core where those who are redesigning the sector converge. Being part of the CCIC means entering an active community of innovation, where experience mixes with disruption and real opportunities for collaboration, visibility and growth open up.

Here connections are generated with leading companies in the sector and a diversity of SMEs and visionary professionals. We are rethinking every construction process for its industrialization, seeking to improve efficiency and sustainability. From new products and modular systems to algorithms that think faster than regulations, the ecosystem is advancing… and you can be part of it.

If you believe that industrialization, data and applied intelligence can transform the way we build, you are in the right place. If you seek to add capabilities, share projects or scale your impact, join today.

Pre-register, I will contact you and send you detailed information to access our network.

TEAM.TITLE: A great team
TEAM.DESCRIPTION:
The Council for Industrialized Construction of Catalonia (CCIC) is born as a coordinated response from the main public and private agents in the territory to promote a stable space for debate, action and real transformation of the construction sector. With the support of key entities such as the Barcelona Chamber of Commerce, the Barcelona Zona Franca Consortium and the Government of Catalonia, the CCIC is consolidated as the meeting point where the master lines of the country's construction future are defined.

Since its origin, the cluster has oriented its activity towards the deep modernization of processes, with special attention to the integration of digital technologies, new organizational models and industrialized systems. This collective commitment to a structural transformation – based on innovation, sustainability and collaboration – has made the CCIC the benchmark space for all those initiatives that want to rethink how the habitat of the future is designed, manufactured and managed.

DIRECTORS.NAME: Pedro Armora
DIRECTORS.SEMBLANCE:
Technical engineering studies and PDD IESE 2004
Founding partner of Aykos Healthcare / Kosmo / Bosq / CCiC
My professional career has been oriented to the international commercial sector, and I have dedicated myself to opening markets for different sectors (textile, DataCenters, engineering, industrialized construction). I have had international experience through all my companies and professional collaborations.

Since 2015 I have been an international consultant for large companies; to open new international markets (Real Estate and Industrial sector).
Since 2007 I have been basically dedicated to analyzing solutions in the field of industrialized modular construction for the hotel and hospital sector, taking into account the different markets and needs. Among the projects developed, the most interesting and innovative would be the first 100% modular hotel in Africa (Dakar), with 90 rooms (5+1 floors) and a hospital in Mauritius, also 100% modular.
For two years now, I have been one of the founders of the CCiC, the innovation platform in the construction sector and its transformation towards industrialization, digitalization, sustainability and specific training.

DIRECTORS.NAME: Ignasi Pérez Arnal
DIRECTORS.SEMBLANCE:
CEO of BIM Academy, creates with CATEB the first international event of European scope on BIM, the European BIM Summit in Barcelona in 2014, and since 2018 directs the National Congress of Advanced Architecture and Construction 4.0 of REBUILD in Barcelona and since 2021 Build. He directs the first e-learning platform of the AECO sector, The BIM Force, which is currently in a programming process and is a member of Building SMART Spanish Chapter.

He has been director, among others, of the Master's Degree in BIM in Civil Engineering and the Master's Degree in Construction Project Manager, and currently directs the first Master's Degree in BIM and Sustainability at butic The New School.
He began his BIM training in 2003 with the mebss project, modular, off-site, industrialized spaces that were put up for sale as a real estate product at Barcelona Meeting Point. The forced use of advanced software such as AECOsim from Bentley, Catia and previously the 3D modeler on Unix, Mountain Top, gives him a different vision of what design and construction processes should be.

TRANSFORMATION_OF_THE_CONSTRUCTION_SECTO.TITLE: Transformation of the construction sector
TRANSFORMATION_OF_THE_CONSTRUCTION_SECTO.DESCRIPTION:
The Cluster of Industrialized Construction of Catalonia (CCIC) is born from the union of professionals with solid and complementary careers: from health applied to housing to architectural innovation, applied engineering, energy efficiency and industrial management; this strategic alliance allows us to shape a space for transformation.

We are committed to a new construction model based on coordination, digitalization and efficiency, using algorithmic methodologies with existing BIM, CAD, which allows integrating personalized industrialized processes of each company from conceptualization to delivery of keys.

The world is digital and automated, procedural co-creation platforms that explore the intersection between systems and construction details, technology, design, sustainability, marketing, monitoring are tools that bring new perspectives on profound changes in the way of building.

With this sum of visions, we consolidate ourselves as a key player to lead the paradigm shift in the construction sector in Catalonia, with an open, inclusive view prepared to face the challenges of a world in continuous evolution.

CONEXION_CREATING_COLLABORATIONS.TITLE: Connection, creating collaborations
CONEXION_CREATING_COLLABORATIONS.DESCRIPTION:
We act as a connector within the industrialized construction ecosystem, generating spaces where companies, professionals, public administrations and knowledge centers can meet to share challenges, visions and strategies. Thanks to the diversity and experience of its members, an active network of trust is created that facilitates the emergence of real collaborations.

These connections become tangible collaborations, shared projects and strategic alliances that allow us to tackle complex challenges from a collective approach. We create a bridge between innovation and action, fostering a collaborative culture in which different perspectives converge with the same purpose: to transform the sector towards a more efficient, sustainable and future-proof construction.

TECHNOLOGICAL_IMPLEMENTATION.TITLE: Technological implementation
TECHNOLOGICAL_IMPLEMENTATION.SUBTITLE: Success story
TECHNOLOGICAL_IMPLEMENTATION.DESCRIPTION:
Success story: Collaboration between various companies in the sector and a computational design studio specialized in parametric geometries. The objective: to develop a modular system for sustainable housing, adaptable to different contexts. Combining industrialized processes with generative algorithms, multiple optimized design variants were generated according to local data such as climate, materials, culture.

The result was compelling: 70% reduction in design time and 50% reduction in on-site waste. The model, now replicated in several municipalities, demonstrates how the union of advanced manufacturing, digitalization and algorithmic design accelerates innovation and fosters collaboration between diverse teams, under a shared logic based on data and efficiency.
